metadata.description: Marketplace for plugins that bring external AI models to Claude Code. Current plugins: GLM (z.ai's GLM-5.1), Gemini (Google's Gemini), opencode (default/last-used model), pi (pi coding agent).

plugins.name: glm
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to z.ai's GLM-5.1 model via claude -p subprocess.

plugins.name: gemini
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to Google's Gemini model via gemini CLI subprocess.

plugins.name: opencode
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to opencode (using its default/last-used model) via the opencode run CLI.

plugins.name: pi
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to the pi coding agent (using its default/configured model) via the pi -p CLI.
